description: Create a content slide titled 'JPMF: How to tender shares' with a vertical six-step process flow showing the tender timeline example and a supporting text block summarizing the overall tender offer timeline.

left.body:
Commencement date → Expiration date → Valuation date (Quarter-End) → Payment Date

Tender Offers are sent approximately 45 days prior to quarter-end. Offer open for 20 business days. Investors must receive at least the initial proceeds within 65 days of Tender Offer expiration date.

steps.label: 3.16.26 — Tender Offer Expiration Date
steps.sub: Open a minimum of 20 business days

steps.label: 5.15.26 — Tender Offer Payment Date
steps.sub: Partial Tender — 100% of proceeds paid within 65 days of Expiration Date; Full Tender — 95% of proceeds paid within 65 days of Expiration Date

steps.label: 5.30.26 — Audit Completion Date
steps.sub: Completed within 60 days of fund’s fiscal year-end (March 31st)

steps.label: 6.5.26 — Audit Holdback Payment Date
steps.sub: Full Tender — 5% audit holdback paid within 5 business days of audit completion
